_comment: Documentation-only fields such as _comment and _param_help are ignored by the code.

_param_help.n_items: Number of rectangles generated before Spark distributes them.
_param_help.n_partitions: Number of Spark partitions used for distributed spatial partitioning and local tree builds.
_param_help.max_entries: Maximum number of entries in each local R-tree node before splitting.
_param_help.n_queries: Number of distributed rectangle intersection queries.
_param_help.seed: Random seed for dataset generation and query sampling.
_param_help.space_width: Width of the global 2D synthetic space.
_param_help.space_height: Height of the global 2D synthetic space.
_param_help.max_query_width: Maximum width of generated query rectangles.
_param_help.max_query_height: Maximum height of generated query rectangles.
